name: claude-finance
description: Standalone catalog for the myfi plugin. Named `claude-finance` (the repo), deliberately distinct from the dedicated `fl03` catalog at FL03/claude, so adding this repo never overwrites that one -- Claude Code keeps only one marketplace per name.

plugins.name: myfi
plugins.description: An all-in-one financial plugin with a wall-street grade financial planner alongside a custom toolkit and supported with various related skills ensuring a QUANT level understanding of market conditions.
